description: Address review findings: fix SDK activation during onboarding, remove fail-open on purchase errors, use localizedPrice with fallback, and fix logShowPaywall timing.
steps: In adaptyClient.ts: remove logShowPaywall from getPaywall helper, export a new logPaywallImpression(paywall) function.

In PaywallScreen.tsx: call activateAdapty() before getPaywall in useEffect; remove grantAccess('yearly') from the else branch of annual purchase error handling (replace with errorHaptic + Alert); use yearlyProduct?.localizedPrice with fallback to YEARLY_PRICE constant; call logPaywallImpression after products are stored in state.

In StandalonePaywall.tsx: call activateAdapty() before getPaywall in useEffect; remove grantAccess('yearly') from the else branch of annual purchase error handling (replace with errorHaptic + Alert); use yearlyProduct?.localizedPrice with fallback to YEARLY_PRICE constant; call logPaywallImpression after products are stored in state.
acceptance_criteria: activateAdapty() is called inside both PaywallScreen and StandalonePaywall useEffects before getPaywall
No grantAccess call exists in any purchase error branch (only user-facing alerts)
Pricing display uses product.localizedPrice when available, falling back to hardcoded constants
logShowPaywall is not called inside getPaywall helper
A new logPaywallImpression function is exported from adaptyClient.ts
logPaywallImpression is called from each paywall component after products are stored in state
